articles.author: Matt Ford, Elizabeth Schumacher, Dharvi Vaid
articles.title: Iran war: Oil prices jump, stocks fall after Trump speech - dw.com
articles.description: Donald Trump said US forces would bring Iran "back to the Stone Ages" as he addressed the American people on the war. Oil prices surged following his speech, while Iran vowed a "crushing" response. DW has the latest.
articles.content:
Trump urged countries that rely on oil through the Strait of Hormuz to 'grab and cherish it'Image: Alex Brandon/AFP

articles.author: Jill Lawless, Jamey Keaten, Josh Boak
articles.title: US-Europe rift widens as Trump lashes out at NATO allies over Mideast war - AP News
articles.description: U.S. President Donald Trump says he’s strongly considering pulling the United States out of NATO, yet he failed to mention the alliance in his speech to the American public about the Iran war. Trump has ratcheted up his criticism of European leaders and expos…
articles.content: WASHINGTON (AP) U.S. President Donald Trump has been fuming about NATO, musing about leaving the alliance, ratcheting up his criticism of European leaders and exposing a wider rift in the trans-Atlan… [+7098 chars]

articles.author: Beshay
articles.title: How Americans view Trump’s handling of trade and tariffs - Pew Research Center
articles.description: Nearly six-in-ten U.S. adults are not confident that Trump can make good decisions about trade policy. Views of trade between the U.S. and China, Canada and Mexico have shifted since 2025.
articles.content:
